subject: FW: Jeffery Epstein
body:
HI Jeffrey...Andrew Farkas and his office are wondering if you will be attending the New Year's Eve party tonight, and if so, if you will be bringing  guests...it is on ALF's chartered boat, Perserverance II.  Did you want me to tell them anything?
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Mulhare, Shelby [mailto:SMulhare@islecap.com] 
Sent: Monday, December 31, 2007 12:07 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW:Jeffery Epstein

Hi,

Will Jeffery be attending ALF's New Year's Eve party tonight?  If so, will he be bringing any guests?  The party will be on ALF's chartered boat, Perserverance II.

His bberry is missing, so he is using Sandi's.  Her phone number is 646-554-4720 and email is sfarkas@islecap.com.


Thanks and Happy New Year!

Shelby


-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Sandi
Sent: Monday, December 31, 2007 12:03 PM
To: Mulhare, Shelby
Subject: Jeffery Epstein

Pls call his office. He needs to know that tonight's party is on board perseverence ii as well as at every restaurant at yacht haven. I am expecting him as my guest on the yacht. We need to know if he is coming, if so, with how many, and then we need names for security. Let him know my phone and bberry are missing but I should have a replacement by 5:00 today.
--------------------------------------------------------
